name: Extra Cash Pawn
description_short: Extra Cash Pawn operates three Oklahoma City locations offering collateral-based loans on jewelry, firearms, musical instruments, and general merchandise with same-day funding.
description_long:
Extra Cash Pawn is a multi-location pawn shop operating in Oklahoma City with three retail locations on MacArthur Boulevard, Hefner Road, and Western Avenue. The business has been established to serve customers seeking quick access to cash through collateral-based lending arrangements. The company emphasizes a professional, clean, and secure environment as a differentiator in the pawn shop industry.

Extra Cash Pawn's primary services include short- and long-term pawn loans on a wide range of merchandise categories. They specialize in designer and custom jewelry, gold, firearms and accessories, musical instruments, and brand-name merchandise. The company also buys and sells items directly, operates an online store with curbside pickup options, and offers a MobilePawn app for customers to renew loans and make layaway payments. All three locations maintain consistent hours: Monday-Friday 9am-6pm, Saturday 9am-6pm, and Sunday 12pm-5pm.

The company distinguishes itself through claims of maintaining "the cleanest pawnshop," emphasizing a friendly and safe environment, and offering a wide variety of brand-name merchandise at discounted prices. They promote confidentiality and convenience in their lending process. The addition of an online shopping platform with curbside pickup and a mobile app for loan management represents efforts to modernize the traditional pawn shop model.

As a pawn shop, Extra Cash Pawn provides short-term liquidity through collateral-based loans rather than traditional credit products. Customers must own items of sufficient value and be willing to pledge them as collateral. The company does not disclose interest rates, fees, loan terms, or other financial details on their website, which is typical for the pawn shop category but limits transparency. This is a legitimate financial service for those needing immediate cash without credit checks, though it requires surrendering personal property temporarily or permanently.
address: 8316 S Western Ave, Oklahoma City, OK 73139

company_info.headquarters: 8316 S Western Ave, Oklahoma City, OK 73139

pros: Three conveniently located Oklahoma City stores with consistent operating hours and online shopping
Accepts wide variety of collateral including jewelry, firearms, musical instruments, and brand merchandise
Emphasizes clean, professional, and secure environment per customer testimonials
Offers both short- and long-term loan options on collateral
MobilePawn app allows customers to renew loans and manage payments remotely
Online store with curbside pickup option for added convenience
No credit check required for pawn loans
cons: Website provides no information on interest rates, fees, or loan terms, making cost comparison impossible
Pawn loans require surrendering personal property, creating risk of permanent loss if unable to repay
Limited to Oklahoma City locations only—no statewide or multi-state presence
No transparency about redemption terms, storage fees, or what happens to unredeemed items
Collateral-based lending structure means loan amounts are restricted by item value rather than borrower need
best_for: Individuals needing immediate cash who own valuable items (jewelry, instruments, firearms) and prefer to avoid credit inquiries
People seeking short-term liquidity without credit approval requirements
Customers looking to buy discounted brand-name merchandise or firearms
diagnosis: Extra Cash Pawn is best for Oklahoma City residents or visitors who own valuable items and need immediate cash without credit checks or underwriting delays. The primary caveat is that pawn loans require pledging personal property as collateral—if the loan is not repaid, the item is forfeited—and the website does not disclose interest rates or fees, making it impossible to assess the true cost of borrowing before visiting a location.
services: Pawn loans on designer and custom jewelry
Pawn loans on gold and precious metals
Pawn loans on firearms and accessories
Direct purchase and sale of merchandise
MobilePawn app for loan renewal and payment management
